documents.text: vendor_sdk 8.1.4 release notes. Refactored network initialization layer. Removed legacy proxy configuration support from Client.__init__. The proxies keyword argument is no longer accepted. Streamlined client connection workflows to rely on external proxy environment variables. Migration: remove proxies= from VendorClient and Client constructor calls.

documents.title: After upgrading to v8.1.4 our integrations fail during client initialization. Rollback fixes the issue.
documents.text: GitHub Issue #482 vendor_sdk python. After upgrading to v8.1.4 our payment integrations fail during client initialization. Traceback: TypeError: Client.__init__() got unexpected keyword argument 'proxies'. Rollback to 8.1.3 fixes the issue immediately. Multiple teams reporting same failure in CI pipelines.

documents.title: Migration guide needed for proxy configuration changes.
documents.text: GitHub Issue #483 vendor_sdk proxies parameter deprecation path. Documentation request for migrating proxy configuration after 8.1.4. Several users confused about Client.__init__ signature changes and httpx proxy routing.

express 4.19.2 maintenance release. Minor updates tracking standard route header configuration processing loops. No breaking API changes. Unrelated to Python client initialization or vendor_sdk proxy subsystem.
kubernetes python client 29.0.1 patch release. PyYAML loader deprecation warnings in CI runners. kubectl auth plugin updates for GKE clusters. No vendor_sdk or payment gateway impact.

Docker base runner engine ubuntu-24.04 amd64 initialization successful. npm and poetry cache volume mounts. NODE_ENV staging PORT 8080 environment vectors. Infrastructure only, no application dependency changes.

eslint prettier configuration update for frontend lint rules. checkout.css styling refresh for staging deploy preview. Documentation README proxy migration notes for on-call handoff. Non-functional asset changes.

Bump vendor_sdk to 8.1.4 in api-node lockfile poetry.lock requirements.txt. Wire vendor_sdk proxy routes into payment gateway client payment_gateway.py initialize_client VendorClient proxies config proxy_routes.
GitHub Issue #401 OAuth token refresh failure in unrelated microservice. JWT validation middleware TypeError different from Client proxies initialization. Auth service only.
